spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Azzanar is an 18th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). Azzanar can cast {@spell disguise self} and {@spell invisibility} at will and has the following wizard spells prepared:

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Azzanar wields his {@item staff of the magi} and he wears his {@item Azzanar's Red Robe}. In addition, he wears a {@item ring of spell storing} containing a 5th-level {@spell magic missile} spell.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Azzanar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage.

from: elven chain mail, staff of power

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Rhoderihck wields a {@item staff of power} and wears a {@item cloak of elvenkind}, a {@item belt of dwarvenkind}, {@item elven chain mail} and {@item boots of elvenkind} (though he isn't attuned to the cloak). In addition, he wears a {@item ring of spell storing} containing a 5th-level {@spell counterspell|PHB} spell, a {@item ring of invisibility}, a {@item ring of radiant resistance}, a {@item ring of psychic resistance}, and carries with him {@item rhoderihck's bag of holding|WorldOfLight}.

trait.name: Thaumaturgic Expert
entries: Rhoderihck can be attuned to 4 magical items at a time.

trait.name: Spell Bombardment
entries: Once per turn, when Rhoderihck rolls damage for a spell and rolls the highest number possible on any of the dice, he gets to choose one of the dice and roll it again and add that roll to the damage.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Rhoderihck has advantage on saving throws made against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Metamagic
entries: Rhoderihck has 20 sorcery points, which he can spend to gain additional spell slots, or sacrifice spell slots to gain additional sorcery points. In addition, he can use it to twist his spells to suit his needs. He has the following Metamagic options:

items.name: Quickened Spell
items.entry: When Rhoderihck casts a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, he can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting.

items.name: Seeking Spell
items.entry: If Rhoderihck makes an attack roll for a spell and misses, he can spend 2 sorcery points to reroll the d20, and he must use the new roll. He can use Seeking Spell even if he has already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.

items.name: Subtle Spell
items.entry: When Rhoderihck casts a spell, he can spend 1 sorcery point to cast it without any somatic or verbal components.

items.name: Twinned Spell
items.entry: When Rhoderihck casts a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of self, he can spend a number of sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature in range with the same spell (1 sorcery point if the spell is a cantrip). To be eligible, a spell must be incapable of targeting more than one creature at the spell's current level. For example, magic missile and scorching ray aren't eligible, but ray of frost and chromatic orb are.

trait.name: War Caster
entries: Rhoderihck has advantage on Constitution saving throws made to maintain concentration on his spells.

trait.name: Wild Magic
entries: Whenever Rhoderihck casts a spell of 1st level or higher, roll a d100. On a 33 or lower, roll on his Wild Magic Surge table. He gets to roll twice and take either number.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Rhoderihck is a 20th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 19}, {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). He knows the following sorcerer spells:

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Rhoderihck makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) force damage.

reaction.name: Bend Luck
entries: Whenever another creature Rhoderihck can see makes an attack roll, an ability check or a saving throw, he cas use his reaction to spend 2 sorcery points to roll {@dice 1d4} and apply the number rolled as a bonus or penalty to the creature's roll.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Azran's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). Azran can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Azran is a 13th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). He knows the following wizard spells, and prepared spells are marked with brackets:

trait.name: Special Equipment
entries: Azran carries a {@item Figurine of Wondrous Power, Silver Raven||Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)}.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Azran has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed}, and magic can't put him to sleep.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Illusory Step (Recharges after the Illusionist Casts an Illusion Spell of 1st Level or Higher).
entries: Azran can create an illusory duplicate of himself as an instant, almost instinctual reaction to danger.

Whenever a creature makes an attack roll against Azran, he can use his reaction to interpose an illusory duplicate between the attacker and himself. The attack automatically misses, then the illusion dissapates.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The living spell can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The living spell has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The living spell makes two Magical Strike attacks.

action.name: Magical Strike
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 5d6 + 4}) force damage.

action.name: Spell Mimicry {@recharge 5}
entries: The living spell unleashes a ray of magical force in a line 60 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 75 ({@damage 10d6 + 40}) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target is disintegrated if this damage leaves it with 0 hit points. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. The creature can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Lucien is a 12th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). Lucien has the following wizard spells prepared:

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Lucien makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atk ms,rs} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) force damage.

reaction.name: Instinctive Charm {@recharge 4}
entries: When a visible creature within 30 feet of Lucien makes an attack roll against it, Lucien forces the attacker to make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the attacker redirects the attack roll to the creature closest to it, other than Lucien or itself. If multiple eligible creatures are closest, the attacker chooses which one to target.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The living spell can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The living spell has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The living spell makes two Magical Strike attacks.

action.name: Magical Strike
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@dice 4d8 + 5}) poison damage.

action.name: Spell Mimicry {@recharge 5}
entries: The living spell creates a 40-foot-diameter sphere of fog within 60 feet of it (the fog spreads around corners). When a creature enters the fog for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw, taking 22 ({@damage 5d8}) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

The fog moves 10 feet away from the living spell at the start of each of its turns, rolling along the ground and through openings. The fog lasts for 10 minutes or until the living spell's concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell).

trait.name: Blurred Movement
entries: Attack rolls against the lornling have disadvantage unless the lornling is {@condition incapacitated} or {@condition restrained}.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the lornling is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lornling makes three dagger attacks.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d4 + 6}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Frumious Fur Coat
entries: The Bandersnatch is covered in a cruel bristling coat of sword like spines coated with a powerful feyborn venom. When a creature hits the Bandersnatch with a melee attack, it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Dexterity saving throw, or take 8 ({@dice 2d6}) piercing damage. A creature that takes this piercing damage must succeed on a subsequent DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned} by the pain from the venom until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Bandersnatch makes four attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, and one with its barbed tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Barbed Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) piercing damage. A creature that takes this piercing damage must succeed on a subsequent {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition poisoned} by the pain from the venom coating the Bandersnatch's spines until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Roar {@recharge 4}
entries: The Bandersnatch emits a loud roar. Each creature within 300 feet of the Bandersnatch must succeed on a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw or take 10 ({@damage 4d4}) thunder damage and be {@condition frightened} until the end of the howler's next turn. While a creature is {@condition frightened} in this way, its speed is halved. A target that successfully saves is immune to the Roar's {@condition frightened} condition for the next 24 hours, though can still take damage from it as normal.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The Bandersnatch makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller creature. If the attack surpasses the targets AC by 5, the target is also swallowed. While swallowed, the target is {@condition blinded} and {@condition restrained}, and has total cover against attacks and other effects outside of the Bandersnatch. It also takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the Bandersnatch's turns. The Bandersnatch can have only one creature swallowed at a time. If the Bandersnatch takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature, the Bandersnatch must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls {@condition prone} in a space within 10 feet of the Bandersnatch. If the Bandersnatch dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition restrained} by it, and can escape the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition prone}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Gallehault has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spellfire Burst
entries: When Gallehault spends at least 1 Sorcery Point as part of the Magic action or a Bonus Action on his turn, he can unleash one of the following magical effects of his choice. He can do so only once per turn.
{@i Bolstering Flames}. Gallehault or one creature he can see within 30 feet of himself gains Temporary Hit Points equal to {@damage 1d8} plus his Charisma modifier.
{@i Radiant Fire.} One creature Gallehault can see within 30 feet of himself takes {@damage 1d8} Fire or Radiant damage (his choice).

trait.name: Absorb Spells
entries: Whenever Gallehault successfully Counterspells a spell, he regains {@dice 1d4} Sorcery Points.

trait.name: Spell Avoidance
entries: When Gallehault is subjected to a spell or magical effect that allows him to make a saving throw to take only half damage, he instead take no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if he fail. He can't use this benefit if he has the {@condition Incapacitated} condition.

trait.name: Metamagic
entries: Gallehault has 20 Sorcery Points.
He has the following Metamagic options at his disposal:

- {@b Empowered Spell}. When he rolls damage for a spell, he can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to his Charisma modifier (minimum of one), and he must use the new rolls. He can use Empowered Spell even if he's already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.
- {@b Heightened Spell}. When he casts a spell that forces a creature to make a saving throw, he can spend 2 Sorcery Points to give one target of the spell Disadvantage on saves against the spell.
- {@b Quickened Spell}. When he casts a spell that has a casting time of an action, he can spend 2 Sorcery Points to change the casting time to a Bonus Action for this casting.

- {@b Seeking Spell}. If he makes an attack roll for a spell and miss, he can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll the {@dice d20}, and he must use the new roll. He can use Seeking Spell even if he's already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.

- {@b Subtle Spell}. When he casts a spell, he can spend 1 Sorcery Point to cast it without any Verbal, Somatic, or Material components, except Material components that are consumed by the spell or that have a cost specified in the spell.

- {@b Twinned Spell}. When he casts a spell, such as Charm Person, that can be cast with a higher-level spell slot to target an additional creature, he can spend 1 Sorcery Point to increase the spell's effective level by 1.

trait.name: Arcane Apotheosis
entries: Gallehault can use one Metamagic option on each of his turns without spending Sorcery Points on it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Gallehault is a 20th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, +14 to hit with spell attacks). He knows the following sorcerer spells:
footerEntries: {@i Spells received from his Spellfire subclass are noted with an asterisk(*).}

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Gallehault makes three Iledrith attacks, or two Anobaith attacks.

action.name: Anobaith
entries: {@atkr mw} {@hit +15}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d4 + 7}) Piercing or Slashing damage plus 18 ({@damage 3d12}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Iledrith (One-Handed)
entries: {@atkr mw} {@hit +18}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 1d8 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 12 ({@damage 2d12}) Force damage.

action.name: Iledrith (Two-Handed)
entries: {@atkr mw} {@hit +18}, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 1d10 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 12 ({@damage 2d12}) Force damage.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Gallehault makes one weapon attack.

legendary.name: Cantrip
entries: Gallehault casts one of his cantrips.

legendary.name: End Magic (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Gallehault casts {@spell dispel magic}.

legendary.name: Mind Blast (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Gallehault magically emits psychic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 22} Intelligence saving throw or take 30 ({@damage 5d8 + 8}) psychic damage and be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

item.name: Azzanar's Red Robe
entries: Created during the inception of the Red Tower, this red robe (originally called the Robe of The Seventh Moon) was subsequently passed down from leader to leader, eventually coming into the hands of Azzanar Cammeraut. While mostly for display, Azzanar—Being a master Wizard capable of incredible feats of Enchantment magic—decided that it needed an upgrade. So, after a couple of years perfecting the enchantment, this Robe is capable of going up against even the Vestiges of The Gods.
You gain these benefits while attuned to and wearing this robe:

entries.name: Sorcerous Power
entries: You gain a +2 bonus to your Spell Save DC, attack rolls and spell damage made using your spellcasting ability.

entries.name: Arcane Insight
entries: You gain proficiency with the {@skill Arcana} skill, and can cast the {@spell Detect Magic} spell at will.

entries.name: Aspect of The Archmage
entries: You permanently gain the effects of the {@spell Mage Armor} spell, granting you a base AC of 13 + your Dexterity modifier while not wearing armor.

entries.name: Elemental Resistance
entries: You have resistance to fire damage.

entries.name: Magic Absorption
entries: You have advantage on saving throws against spell and other magical effects.

In addition, when you are targeted by an enemy's spell, you can use your reaction to absorb a portion of the spell's energy into the robe. The spell affects you normally, but the robe regains a number of charges equal to the level of the spell, to a maximum of 5. Whenever you hit with an attack afterward, you can expend any number of charges from the robe, with the attack dealing an extra 1d8 necrotic damage per charge expended.

item.name: Gallehault's Robe
entries: Gallehault's Robe.
You gain these benefits while attuned to and wearing this robe:

entries.name: Magical Defense
entries: You gain a +1 to your Armor Class.

entries.name: Aspect of The Archmage
entries: You permanently gain the effects of the {@spell Mage Armor} spell, granting you a base AC of 13 + your Dexterity modifier while not wearing armor.

entries.name: Mental Fortitude
entries: You are resistant to Bludgeoning, Piercing and Slashing damage, and you are immune to Psychic damage.

entries.name: Eyes Everywhere
entries: You can cast the {@spell Scrying} spell at will.

entries.name: Magic Absorption
entries: You have advantage on saving throws against spell and other magical effects.

item.name: +2 Ring of Protection
entries: You gain a +2 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.
